T0180.title: Full Identity Dossier
T0180.definition: In illicit data trading, high-resolution photos or scans of both sides of a citizen’s national ID card, containing core identity details such as full name, address, and ID number, used for document forgery or identity theft.
T0180.description: In illicit data trading, this refers to high-definition photographs or scanned copies of the front and back of a national identity card. These images contain essential personal identifiers including the holder’s name, residential address, and ID number, and are primarily used to fabricate fake documents or impersonate the victim.
T0180.usageExample: “Nationwide ‘Priest’ IDs, real validity period, 6u each, available all day, as many as you’ve got.”
